meta.title: Aman Bhatt · ML Engineer & Data Scientist
meta.description: Aman Bhatt — ML Engineer & Data Scientist. Energy forecasting, LLMs, MLOps.

hero.availability: Assistant Manager – Data Science & AI · BSES Rajdhani Power Limited
hero.bio:
Data Scientist & ML Engineer with 4+ years building production ML and generative AI systems for India's
energy sector. Own demand forecasting for Delhi's electricity grid end-to-end — models, pipelines,
deployment — at <3% MAPE. Built solar and wind forecasting systems across 166 renewable plants at ReNew. Architected two production RAG systems (Llama 3.3 70B, ChromaDB, FastAPI) enabling grid operations and company-wide technical documentation access in natural language.

about.label: About me
paragraphs: Data enthusiast and a proficient data scientist with a background in civil engineering. Currently working as an Assistant Manager – Data Science & AI at BSES Rajdhani Power Limited, applying advanced algorithms and techniques to solve complex forecasting problems.

Passionate about leveraging data-driven insights and building AI systems that last — driving measurable business impact across the energy sector. Experienced in bridging research with engineering, enabling grid operators and renewable energy firms to make data-driven decisions at speed.

skills.label: Tech stack
skills.heading: Skills & Tools
skills.sub: From raw data to deployed model — the full ML engineering toolkit.

experience.label: Experience
experience.heading: Work Experience
experience.sub: Building real ML systems in the energy sector.

bullets: Leading the design and deployment of short-term and day-ahead load forecasting models, enhanced with an LLM-powered assistant built using LangChain that allows grid operators and planners to query demand forecasts and scenario analyses in natural language, improving decision-making speed, transparency, and operational efficiency across BRPL's service zones.

Led the development of predictive models for Delhi Discoms (BRPL, BYPL, TPDDL), achieving a 3% MAPE using Neural Networks, LightGBM, CatBoost, and XGBoost for day-ahead and intraday forecasting. Integrated real-time weather data while leveraging Apache Spark and Kafka for efficient data handling.

Developed solar and wind forecasting models for REMC-Telangana (166 plants), designing high-precision week-ahead energy predictions. Deployed models using AWS SageMaker, with automated CI/CD pipelines for seamless updates.
Conducted extensive research and development on price forecasting at IEX, employing diverse models and achieving a notable 7.5% MAPE with innovative strategies using the LightGBM model.
Designed foundation for different equipment and structures that are usually present in oil refineries using softwares like AutoCAD, StaadPro, RISA Base, Foundation 3D, RAM Connection etc.
